title: Human Resource Executive / HR Generalist
description:
We are seeking a proactive and well-rounded Human Resource Executive / HR Generalist to support and manage day-to-day HR operations across the employee lifecycle. This role suits an individual with hands-on HR experience who is able to work independently, exercise sound judgement, and support both operational and people-focused initiatives. The role covers recruitment coordination, payroll administration, employee relations support, and HR compliance, with exposure to continuous process improvement.

Responsibilities and Duties

  • Support end-to-end HR operations across the employee lifecycle, including onboarding and offboarding
  • Prepare and administer employment contracts, HR letters, and personnel documentation
  • Maintain accurate and confidential employee records and HR databases
  • Coordinate monthly payroll processing and statutory submissions (e.g. CPF, IRAS)
  • Serve as the first point of contact for routine HR and employee enquiries
  • Support employee relations matters, probation confirmations, and contract renewals
  • Assist with employee engagement, welfare initiatives, and internal communications
  • Ensure HR processes and documentation comply with applicable employment regulations
  • Support HR reporting, audits, and ad-hoc projects as required

Qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, or a related discipline
  • 2–5 years of relevant HR operations or generalist experience
  • Working knowledge of Singapore Employment Act and statutory HR requirements
  • Strong organisational skills with high attention to detail and confidentiality
  • Good interpersonal, communication, and stakeholder management skills
  • Able to work independently in a fast-paced environment while managing multiple priorities
  • Positive attitude, integrity, and ability to work in a fast-paced environment

postedCompany.description:
Our journey as an international trading business began in 2016.
With headquarter in Singapore and together with branch offices in China and Dubai, we serve the major trading hubs in Asia. The company was conceptualised to prioritise new trading opportunities and solutions through commercial channels, optimising international trade with its partners.
